text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
T-MSIS TAF Annual Provider RIFs Codebook │ December 2025 │ V 1.3 138 

SPCH_LANG_HEARG_TXNMY_IND 

LABEL: Speech, Language or Hearing Services Taxonomy Indicator — Ever in Calendar Year 

DESCRIPTION: Indicates whether the provider’s taxonomy value maps to the speech, language and hearing service 
provider category; ever in the calendar year. 

SHORT NAME: SPCH_LANG_HEARG_TXNMY_IND 

LONG NAME: SPCH_LANG_HEARG_TXNMY_IND 

TYPE: CHAR
